overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular school management system for Indian schools. It covers student management, fee collection, attendance, timetables, HR, transport, communication, and more — fully mobile-optimized as a PWA.
features: Dashboard with fees awaiting (tuition + transport), school background branding
Global student search by name, mobile, parent name, village, class with family grouping
Collect Fees with family member quick-panel for sibling billing
Transport fees integrated into fee calculations and dashboard
